directors.name: Kevin S. Crutchfield
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Crutchfield has over three decades of global mining experience and has served as CEO and Director of Intrepid Potash since December 2024. Previously, he served as CEO, President, and Director of Compass Minerals International, Inc. and CEO and Director of Contura Energy, Inc. (formerly Alpha Metallurgical Resources), as well as CEO of Alpha Natural Resources, Inc.

directors.name: William M. Zisch
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Zisch has over 40 years of business experience and in-depth knowledge of the mining industry, currently serving as Professor of Practice and Department Head of the Mining Department at Colorado School of Mines. He previously served as COO of Argonaut Gold, Inc. and held roles at Royal Gold, Inc. and Newmont Mining Corporation.

directors.name: Hugh E. Harvey, Jr.
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Harvey has over 15 years of experience in the potash mining industry and over 30 years in oil and gas, and previously served in multiple leadership roles at Intrepid Potash including Executive Vice Chair, COO, and CTO. He co-founded Intrepid Mining, the predecessor company to Intrepid Potash, and founded Intrepid Oil and Gas, LLC. His term expires at the 2026 Annual Meeting and he will not stand for reelection.

directors.name: Gonzalo M. Avendano
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Avendano has over 30 years of experience in the finance and wealth management industries and currently serves as an Investment Advisor at Clearway Capital Management. He previously held roles at UBS AG, Deutsche Bank AG, and Lehman Brothers, Inc.

directors.name: Chris A. Elliott
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Elliott has over 30 years of business experience in the agricultural industry and currently serves as CEO and President of Naturion, LLC, a private company investing in environmental restoration. He previously served as CEO of AgCoA, a private agricultural real estate company.

directors.name: Lori A. Lancaster
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Lancaster has a 20-year investment banking career advising public and private companies in natural resources and global energy, executing over $60 billion in transactions. She previously served as Managing Director at UBS Securities, LLC, Nomura Securities, and Goldman Sachs & Co.

directors.name: Mary E. McBride
directors.bio_summary: Ms. McBride is a senior banking executive with over 30 years of experience in commercial banking, having served as President of CoBank, ACB from 2013 to 2016. She also held senior roles at First Interstate Bank of Denver, N.A. and First National Bank of Boston.
prior_employers_named: First Interstate Bank of Denver, N.A.

directors.name: Barth E. Whitham
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Whitham has over 30 years of experience in the energy, banking, and extractive resources industries, and currently serves as CEO, President, and Director of Enduring Resources, LLC. He previously served as President, COO, and Director of Westport Resources Corporation, a public upstream energy company that merged with Kerr McGee/Anadarko.

extraction_notes: Hugh E. Harvey, Jr. is listed as a director whose term expires at the 2026 Annual Meeting and who will not stand for reelection; he is included as a current director. Kevin S. Crutchfield is both a director and the sole named executive officer in the director-section text; no separate executive officer section was provided in the supplied text. Tenure years are calculated from the 'since' date provided to approximate years as of the 2026 filing date. Chris A. Elliott chairs the Compensation Committee per committee listing; his role is set to compensation_committee_chair.
